title: Uthman 's Lineage
description: He is 'Uthman b. 'Affan b. Abi al-'A$ b. Umayyah b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qu$ayy. His mother is Arwa bt. Kurayz b. Rabi'ah b. Habib b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qu$ayy; her mother in turn was Umm Hakim bt. 'Abd al-Muttalib.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
